subject: re: sak automotive website
body:
Hi Scott,

I sent you an email last week but it may have ended up in spam. I mentioned that your site is showing a security warning in every browser and is built on a platform that was discontinued. Both are pushing customers away before they even see what SAK offers.

I put together a quick overview of what to fix -- still happy to send it your way if you're interested.

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
